name: Don & Charle's American Rib & Chop House Cole
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and core the cabbage heads.
2. Slice the cabbage very finely.
3. Mix the sliced cabbage with mayonnaise until thoroughly combined.
4. Add the mini marshmallows to the mixture.
5. Strain the pineapple and add it to the mixture.
6. Whip the whipping cream until peaks form.
7. Add the whipped cream to the mixture.
8. Toss everything well and refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
9. Note: Peel adds a small amount of sugar to sweeten, if desired.
